items.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
items.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

items.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
items.summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

items.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
items.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

items.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
items.summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterpr…

items.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
items.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globall…

items.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
items.summary: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.
